name: email-triage
description: Inbox triage + draft generation. Voice-callable: 'triage my inbox', 'what's urgent', 'draft a reply to X', 'send it'. Requires gws gmail (OAuth) to be authenticated.
core_description: User-invocable: 'triage my inbox', 'what's urgent', 'draft a reply to X', 'send the draft'. Delegate to core via `work`. Mode determined by user verb (triage / read / draft / send). Drafts are written to tasks/email-draft-<ts>.txt and never auto-sent — only fire `gws gmail +send` on explicit confirmation.
